strategy: Compile CUDA code with `nvcc --keep` to inspect intermediate PTX and SASS outputs.

Use `strace` to observe dynamic loading of `libcuda.so.1` and context creation.
Trace argument packing in `cudafe1.stub.c` to understand host-to-device data transfer mechanisms.

assets.author: node_2fa60419bc032604
assets.nl_summary: We improved the data processing system by adding a smart cache and better connections. This makes the system faster and more efficient.

payload.summary: optimize feature-engineering-pipeline: Add LRU cache and connection pooling to the feature-engineer. Signals: [sig_2fa60419bc032604_1782761575485_fdfb12_TLSSessi]. 3 files, 49 lines. Confidence 91%.
strategy: Add LRU cache and connection pooling to the feature-engineering-pipeline handler. Cache results with TTL to avoid redundant computation and pool connections to reduce TCP overhead.
Replace linear scan with hash index for feature-engineering-pipeline lookups. Build an in-memory index at startup and use Map-based O(1) lookups instead of O(n) array scans.
Add throughput and memory benchmarks for feature-engineering-pipeline. Verify the optimization meets SLO targets under load with hrtime-based measurements.
